parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 2048,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are Skill Hunter's resume parser and skill profile extractor.

Analyze this resume and extract a structured skill profile. Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact keys:
{
  "primary_skills": string[] (top 5-8 core skills, tools, or expertise areas),
  "secondary_skills": string[] (supporting skills, nice-to-haves),
  "preferred_industries": string[] (industries the person has served or is best suited for — match to: Law Firms, MedSpas, Dental Practices, Chiropractors, Real Estate Agents, Mortgage Brokers, Insurance Agencies, Restaurants, Contractors, HVAC Companies, Plumbers, Electricians, Auto Shops, Fitness Studios, Local Retail, E-commerce Brands, Nonprofits, Consultants, Coaches, Event Venues, Healthcare Clinics, Home Services),
  "avoid_industries": string[] (industries to avoid based on resume context),
  "preferred_locations": string[] (locations mentioned or implied),
  "skill_level": "entry" | "mid" | "senior" | "expert",
  "tone": string (suggested outreach tone, e.g. 'professional, consultative, direct'),
  "minimum_fit_score": number (50-80, suggested minimum lead score to pursue),
  "summary": string (2-3 sentence professional summary)
}

Be accurate. Do not overstate qualifications. Extract only what is clearly supported by the resume.

Resume:
{{ $json.resume_text.slice(0, 4000) }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": true, "extracted": { "primary_skills": $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.primary_skills, "skill_level": $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.skill_level, "preferred_industries": $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.preferred_industries, "summary": $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.summary }, "message": "Resume parsed and skill profile updated" } }}
